sql_array: CREATE TABLE geometries (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, geom BLOB);
INSERT INTO geometries (id, geom) VALUES (1, st_point(0, 51));
INSERT INTO geometries (id, geom) VALUES (2, st_point(0, 52));
SELECT id FROM geometries WHERE st_intersects(geom, st_point(0, 52), 100);
UPDATE geometries SET geom = st_point(0, 53) WHERE id = 1;
